text.title: Creative Brief Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example: Meta lead-gen brief for a B2B SaaS targeting SaaS founders.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: A 5-person SaaS launching a paid-ads Meta lead-gen campaign. ICP doc + 2 interview transcripts + 1 customer case study are pinned. Owner: @alex-marketing. Goal: 100 demo bookings in 30 days at CPL ≤ $40.

section.title: Brief (JSON)

list.item: Every input has a typed source citation (rule typed-and-sourced-input).
Named single owner with handle (rule named-owner).
Angle + hook + proof claims each cite an input (rule traceable-decision).
